ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the property */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the property */,
  "link" TEXT /* Link to the property listing on external site */,
  "beds" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the property */,
  "baths" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms in the property */,
  "sqft" INTEGER /* Total square footage of the property */,
  "street" TEXT /* Street name of the property address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the property is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the property is located */,
  "zip" TEXT /* ZIP code of the property */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., single-family home, apartment, condo) */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "lot_size" REAL /* Size of the property lot in square feet */,
  "garage" INTEGER /* Number of garage spaces */,
  "features" TEXT /* Additional features of the property (e.g., pool, fireplace) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the property (e.g., available, under contract, sold) */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent managing the property */,
  "date_listed" TEXT /* Date when the property was listed */,
  "date_sold" TEXT /* Date when the property was sold (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., agent, client, admin) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inquiries" (
  "inquiry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inquiry */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being inquired about */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the inquiry */,
  "inquiry_date" TEXT /* Date when the inquiry was made */,
  "message" TEXT /* User’s message regarding the inquiry */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the inquiry (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date when the inquiry was responded to */,
  "response_message" TEXT /* Response message from the agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inquiry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inquiries_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inquiries_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property for which analytics are recorded */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the property listing has received */,
  "inquiries_received" INTEGER /* Number of inquiries received for the property */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the analytics were last updated */,
  "favorites" INTEGER /* Number of times the property has been favorited */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* Number of times the property has been shared */,
  "comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the property listing */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating given by users */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the agent */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the real estate agent */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the agent */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the agent */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the agent's profile picture */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the agent based on user feedback */,
  "reviews" INTEGER /* Number of reviews the agent has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agents_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key for the setting */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the setting was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)
